text:
Advantage dual-eligible 
special needs plans (D-SNPs), strengthened Medicare-Medicaid integration requirements. All D-SNPs 
must have executed contracts with state Medicaid agencies, referred to as the State Medicaid Agency 
Contract (SMAC) or MIPPA contract, that meet several requirements, including Medicare-Medicaid 
integration requirements. Additional details regarding D-SNPS is available on the CMS website, for 
example: https://www.cms.gov/medicare/medicaid-coordination/about/dsnps
